name: TP4056 LiPo Charger
manufacturer: TPOWER / NanJing Top Power ASIC Corp

powerStates.label: Charging (1A)
powerStates.notes: Maximum charge rate, RPROG=1kΩ. INPUT current, not battery current

powerStates.label: Trickle Charge
powerStates.notes: Battery below 3.0V threshold, 1/10 of RPROG current

powerStates.label: Charge Complete (standby)
powerStates.notes: Battery full, maintaining 4.2V float, STDBY LED on

powerStates.label: Shutdown
powerStates.notes: CE pin low, no charging activity

passiveCircuits.label: RPROG Charge Rate Resistor
passiveCircuits.why: Sets the maximum charge current. I_charge = 1000 / RPROG(kΩ) in mA. This is NOT optional — without RPROG, charge current is undefined and can exceed 1A damaging the battery. Use 2kΩ for USB-safe 500mA.

components.placement: PROG pin to GND — THIS SETS CHARGE CURRENT

passiveCircuits.label: Input Decoupling
passiveCircuits.why: USB input has significant impedance over a cable. The input cap absorbs switching transients from the TP4056 internal linear regulator, preventing USB enumeration failures.

passiveCircuits.label: Battery Output Decoupling
passiveCircuits.why: Provides a stable BAT output for the downstream LDO or buck converter. Prevents charge-current switching noise from propagating into the MCU supply.
